actions.script: async function fetchWithRetry(url,retries,delay){for(var attempt=0;attempt<=retries;attempt++){var resp=await fetch(url,{credentials:'include'});if(resp.ok){var text=await resp.text();if(text.trim().charAt(0)==='<'){if(attempt<retries){await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,delay*(attempt+1))});continue;}throw new Error('Wayback API returned HTML (status '+resp.status+') after '+(retries+1)+' attempts');}return JSON.parse(text);}if(resp.status===429||resp.status>=500){if(attempt<retries){await new Promise(function(r){setTimeout(r,delay*(attempt+1))});continue;}}throw new Error('Wayback API error: HTTP '+resp.status+' after '+(retries+1)+' attempts');}return null;} var domainList='${domains}'.split(',').map(function(d){return d.trim()}).filter(function(d){return d.length>0}); var allResults=[]; for(var i=0;i<domainList.length;i++){var currentDomain=domainList[i]; try{var data=await fetchWithRetry('https://web.archive.org/__wb/sparkline?output=json&url='+encodeURIComponent(currentDomain)+'&collection=web',3,3000); var result={}; result.domain_name=currentDomain; result.first_archived=data.first_ts||null; result.last_archived=data.last_ts||null; var years=data.years||{}; var totalSnapshots=0; var yearData={}; var yearKeys=Object.keys(years); for(var y=0;y<yearKeys.length;y++){var year=yearKeys[y]; var months=years[year]; yearData[year]=months; for(var m=0;m<months.length;m++){totalSnapshots+=months[m];}} result.total_snapshots=totalSnapshots; result.years=yearData; if(result.first_archived){var ft=result.first_archived; result.first_archived_date=ft.substring(0,4)+'-'+ft.substring(4,6)+'-'+ft.substring(6,8);} if(result.last_archived){var lt=result.last_archived; result.last_archived_date=lt.substring(0,4)+'-'+lt.substring(4,6)+'-'+lt.substring(6,8);} result.success=true; allResults.push(result);}catch(err){allResults.push({domain_name:currentDomain,success:false,error:err.message});}} return JSON.stringify({total_domains:domainList.length,results:allResults});
